judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but deeply unprofitable with a highly leveraged balance sheet.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 16.3%; next earnings date 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Gross margin 69.4% — strong unit economics on services rendered.
Mean analyst target $138.90 suggests significant upside potential.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and Profit margin -25.6% — significant losses on operations.
Forward P/E -169.01x — priced for extreme future growth, currently loss-making.
Total debt $35.15B vs $2.27B cash — substantial negative net debt.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-8.56B — burning cash at a high rate.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave is reportedly building its enterprise business, particularly within financial services, and is being highlighted by hedge funds as a potential AI supply chain play. However, the company's significant compute costs for AI applications, as seen in film production, and its current loss-making status suggest a high-risk, high-reward profile. Traders should monitor any further developments on enterprise adoption and the ongoing debate around AI infrastructure valuations.

headlines.title: AI supply chain, Gen Z spending among hedge fund picks at Sohn Hong Kong
This Cannes Film Cost $500,000 to Make. $400,000 Was AI Compute Costs.
CoreWeave Building Up Enterprise Business, Led By Financial Services
